telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 13, 2026 Markets traded defensively with elevated VIX at 27 signaling broad risk-off sentiment despite crypto resilience. The stagflationary backdrop kept bonds weak while a firm dollar pressured risk assets, creating a bifurcated environment where traditional hedges like gold held up better than growth-sensitive sectors.
